warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The role-play scenario or its summary is absent, and no issues are identified.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either the role-play scenario and its summary are presented, or the core issues are identified.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The role-play scenario and its summary are presented, and the core issues are identified.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A thorough understanding of the role-play summary is evident, alongside a clear and precise definition of the problems.

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No potential solutions are put forward.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Potential solutions are offered, but their advantages and/or disadvantages are not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two potential solutions are presented, with an analysis of their respective benefits and drawbacks.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several potential solutions are presented, each with a comprehensive analysis of numerous advantages and disadvantages.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No proposed resolution is presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A resolution is offered, but a strategy for putting it into practice is not outlined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible resolution is presented, along with a well-formed strategy for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical resolution and a detailed implementation strategy are developed, including the identification of required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas
criteria.description: The core areas of knowledge for the event, which include Marketing Fundamentals, Market Planning, Marketing-Information Management, Product/Service Management, Channel Management, Pricing, Promotion, and Selling.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the specified knowledge domains is shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding is shown in either one or two of the specified knowledge domains.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding is shown in three of the specified knowledge domains.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding is shown in four or more of the specified knowledge domains.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were ready, but the presentation lacked a coherent structure.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order, and all statements were clearly articulated and well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified communication skills were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified communication skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were exhibited.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified communication skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were exhibited.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified communication skills were exhibited, significantly enhancing the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Incapable of providing responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to inquiries are incomplete.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to inquiries are thorough and complete.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Engaged with the judges while providing comprehensive answers to inquiries.
